stadium.name: The Cistern
stadium.description: An abandoned underground cistern repurposed as a subterranean arena. The damp stone field is perpetually slick with condensation, and pools of noxious runoff collect in the dark corners. The thick, stagnant air clings to the skin, and players must navigate the treacherous, wet perimeter with extreme caution to avoid the toxic hazards of the pit.

stats.pregame_ritual: Trying to catch a fly with their bare hands.
Getting a teammate to pour a bucket of cold water over their head.
Muttering a nonsensical rhyme to ward off bad spirits.
Reciting their grocery list backward to clear their mind.
Chugging a small bottle of vinegar.
Painting a crude, snarling face on their stomach.
Asking the referee to bless their weapon.
Fasting for the six hours leading up to the match.
Organizing a small betting pool on who will score first.
Huddling so tightly that no light can be seen between them.
Braiding their hair into tight, battle-ready rows.
Getting a teammate to pour a bucket of cold water over their head.

stadium.name: The Cliffside Pitch
stadium.description: A perilous, windswept field built next to the town's lighthouse. There is no ocean-side barrier, and the wind is notoriously unpredictable. The tusk-like lighthouse is the only landmark.

stats.pregame_ritual: Telling each other exaggerated lies about their own strength.
Stretching their hamstrings for exactly seven minutes.
Rubbing the Trollball on their armpits for 'grip'.
Arranging their gear in a perfect, aesthetically pleasing spiral.
Adjusting their codpiece with theatrical importance.
Getting a teammate to pour a bucket of cold water over their head.
Muttering a nonsensical rhyme to ward off bad spirits.
Filing down a single fingernail into a sharp point.
Giving the Trollball a heroic backstory before each game.
Listening to the wind for a sign of which way the game will turn.
Wearing a necklace of polished river stones.

preGame:
Folks, gather 'round, grab your finest Stein, and prepare yourselves for the most spectacular collision of leather, muscle, and madness that Osterra has ever witnessed! We are live here at The Cistern, deep within the treacherous Noxus Subterrane, and it is time for the Grand Finals Bracket Reset! The New Noxus Thorns, backed by the mighty Blackthorn Company, are poised to unleash the hellfire from the depths, while across the damp, noxious floor, The Southport Narwhals, sponsored by Grimfrost, are ready to fight their way out of the mud! The very ground beneath our feet is a hazard, folks; this arena is slick with condensation, shrouded in deadly sewer poison, and the abandoned reservoir promises treacherous footing for any fool who slips! 

Our Noxus Thorns are looking sharp! Look at Olodort Rossy, already sipping that vial of vinegar as a pre-game ritual, preparing himself for the carnage! He knows he has the thunder in his Kirkhammer! On the other side, the Narwhals are sharpening their edges; Blood Eppes is dedicating exactly seven minutes to his hamstrings, ensuring that Cutlass is ready to cleave through the opposition! 

We've seen the valiant efforts of those noble adventurers of the realm, yet even they struggle to maintain composure against the sheer brutality of Trollball! Will the Narwhals find the grit to overcome the corrosive dampness, or will the Thorns prove too much for the proud sailors of Southport? Oh, the potential! The violence! It's a glorious spectacle, and I, Nok the Corrupter, cannot wait to report the inevitable triumph of brute force! Let the slaughter begin!
postGame:
Good heavens, what a magnificent display of monstrous might! The dust has settled, the troll head has been secured, and the scoreboard confirms the devastation: The New Noxus Thorns have wrestled victory from the jaws of utter annihilation, defeating the Southport Narwhals by the score of 2 to 0! 

This match was a veritable tidal wave of chaos! The subterranean perils of The Cistern played a role, mind you! Poisoned players staggered through the fog, slick condensation caused near-disasters with every tackle, and the Thorns utilized those hazards perfectly! The Narwhals looked magnificent trying to drive forward, with Cibis Areta repeatedly seizing possession, but the Noxus Thorns simply refused to yield the field! 

Oh, the sheer violence! We saw Loralyn Lyndy bring down poor Hulbig Addiel, and Braden Gaile seemed intent on poisoning every single Thorn player he could find! But the nail in the coffin, the absolute crown jewel of this performance, came late in the game when Olodort Rossy, utilizing the deadly stench of the Away Field, unleashed a cannon shot that found the basket! A glorious two points, and the Narwhals, despite their best efforts, could not recover! 

While I must admit a moment's envy for the Narwhals' fighting spirit—they almost made me cheer for them, blast it all—the New Noxus Thorns proved they possess the sheer, unstoppable malice required to win! They advance, folks, to the next round! The Grand Finals are heating up, and with the Ebon Gate Corruptors watching this spectacle with such glee, one can only say this tournament has the potential to be a monumental display of glorious corruption!
